concerns.text: SC-001 requires calculating and reporting the Pearson correlation coefficient between DFT-derived shear modulus and experimental yield strength. The plan.md mentions 'Correlation Analysis' in the model_output.schema.yaml but lacks an explicit phase, task, or code module description dedicated to computing and reporting this specific metric in the narrative or technical context sections.

SC-005 requires reporting if the standard deviation of Permutation Importance scores across 10 bootstrapped samples is < 0.05. While FR-008 and the plan's 'interpretability/bootstrap_stability.py' mention calculating the standard deviation, the plan does not explicitly state that the system will evaluate this against the 0.05 threshold and report the boolean result as required by the success criterion.
